beats.narration: Every part carries its biography. How it was made decides which flaws it can hold, where they sit, and which way they run.

payload.title: THE PART'S PAST
payload.sub: How it was made decides which flaws it can hold.

beats.narration: Four families: ingots where steel begins, castings frozen to shape, wrought sections rolled and forged, and welds with their own cracks.

tiles.s: A crack family of its own

beats.narration: Flaws travel: a blowhole at the ingot surface rolls flat into a tight seam; pipe and inclusions flatten into laminations inside plate.

payload.heading: From ingot to wrought
payload.note: SAME FLAW — NEW SHAPE, NEW NAME

beats.narration: Predict the indication: tight surface cracks draw sharp, dense lines; subsurface flaws show broad and fuzzy; smooth laps and cold shuts barely hold particles.
If you know how it was made, you know what to hunt and which way to magnetize. Predict the flaw before the shot.

payload.sub: Predict the flaw before the shot.
